current_suggestion.pitch: Naval's channel covers the intersection of clear thinking, wealth philosophy, and the examined life — territory adjacent to your Stoicism, mental models, and Bitcoin/monetary interests but approached from a distinctly Eastern-meets-rationalist angle that none of your current channels hit. His content includes solo tweetstorm breakdowns, long-form podcast appearances, and rare interviews where he applies first-principles reasoning to happiness, desire, and leverage in ways that complement Munger and the Stoics without repeating them. Depth is high and format is mostly medium-length solo or interview cuts, with no hustle-culture filler.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
